extracted_claim.claim_summary: The customer is claiming a cracked laptop screen.

image_assessments.notes: The image clearly shows a laptop with its screen displaying a game, but no crack is visible on the screen.
The image clearly shows a laptop with its screen displaying a game, partially covered by a sticky note with text. No crack is visible on the exposed part of the screen.

result.user_claim: Customer: Wo de laptop screen you crack. | Support: Are you reporting a cracked laptop screen? | Customer: Yes, laptop screen cracked. Qing bang wo check screen. | Support: Is the keyboard or body damaged too? | Customer: No, only screen crack.
result.evidence_standard_met_reason: At least one image shows the claimed screen with sufficient clarity to evaluate the claim.
result.claim_status_justification: The claimed issue (crack) is not visible. Images show 'none' instead. Claim is contradicted by visual evidence.
